sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48008" key="qehkolew/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεηκολ-εών</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n48008.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dwelling of a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θεηκόλος</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:5:15:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.15.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
